HGNChelper 0.8.15
  • Reference
    • HGNChelper Introduction

Package index

All functions

affyToR()
Title function to convert Affymetrix probeset identifiers to valid R names
checkGeneSymbols()
Identify outdated or Excel-mogrified gene symbols
findExcelGeneSymbols()
Title function to identify Excel-mogrified gene symbols
getCurrentHumanMap() getCurrentMouseMap()
Get the current maps for correcting gene symbols
hgnc.table
All current and withdrawn HGNC gene symbols and Excel-mogrified symbols
mouse.table
All current and withdrawn MGI mouse symbols and Excel-mogrified symbols
rToAffy()
Title function to convert the output of affyToR back to the original Affymetrix probeset identifiers.
rToSymbol()
Title function to reverse the conversion made by symbolToR
symbolToR()
Title function to *reversibly* convert HGNC gene symbols to valid R names.

Developed by Sehyun Oh, Ayush Aggarwal, Markus Riester, Levi Waldron.

Site built with pkgdown 2.1.1.
